summary: Single Team subscriber Peacock scheduled/live non-subscribed teams - Game Tile
description:
GIVEN the user is a single team subscriber
AND there is a Peacock Game scheduled/in-progress without the subscribed-to-team
AND the game level blackedOutVideo equals true in MASTepg
AND the game level entitledVideo equals false in MASTepg

steps.action: WHEN the user views the Peacock game tile focused or unfocused
steps.result:
THEN the Peacock pill is displayed left aligned at the bottom of the game tile
AND a lock icon is displayed in the upper right corner of the game tile
AND the team colors in the matchup header have a dark overlay
